title: tricholaena teneriffae subsp. teneriffae
intro: Tricholaena teneriffae subsp. teneriffae, also known as the Canary Island Cootamundra grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tricholaena teneriffae subsp. teneriffae include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and infections, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
